title: micromeria dalmatica
intro: Micromeria dalmatica, also known as Dalmatian pennyroyal, is a perennial herb native to the Balkans and Mediterranean regions, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating digestive issues and menstrual cramps. The health benefits of Micromeria dalmatica include its ability to alleviate nausea, reduce fever, and combat bacterial infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to support digestive health and relieve menstrual symptoms.
